subject: english
text: I. Four alternatives are given for each of the following questions/incomplete statements. Choose the correct alternative. 1) It’s flying round the __________(Easy) A) Pillow B)  Lampshade C) Door D) window 2) ‘buzzed off’ means ___________(Easy) A) flying B) rolling C) walked away D) gone away 3) Poet felt _________ when he saw the fly. (Easy) A) happy B) excited C) insane D) sad 4) The sound of the horse is _________(Easy) A) neigh B) bark C) hiss D) buzz 5) _________ is not an insect. (Easy) A) butterfly B) frog C) cockroach D) housefly 24
